member.name: M:AeroponicIOT.Controllers.ActuatorController.PublishActuatorCommandViamqtt(AeroponicIOT.Models.Device,AeroponicIOT.DTOs.ActuatorControlDto)
member.summary: Publish actuator control command via MQTT Topic: devices/{macAddress}/control Payload: JSON with actuatorType and action

member.name: M:AeroponicIOT.Controllers.AISuggestionController.AnalyzeDevice(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Manually trigger an AI analysis for a specific device. The suggestion will be delivered as a notification to the device owner.

member.summary: Request model for user registration

member.summary: Response model containing JWT token and user information

member.name: T:AeroponicIOT.DTOs.UserInfoDto
member.summary: Response model for user info

member.name: P:AeroponicIOT.DTOs.DeviceDto.ProtocolType
member.summary: Communication protocol: null / "wifi" for ESP32 nodes, "zigbee" for Zigbee2MQTT devices.

member.name: T:AeroponicIOT.Middleware.RequestLoggingMiddleware.__LogHttpRequestStruct
member.summary: This API supports the logging infrastructure and is not intended to be used directly from your code. It is subject to change in the future.

member.name: P:AeroponicIOT.Models.Device.ProtocolType
member.summary: Communication protocol: "wifi" (default) or "zigbee".

member.name: P:AeroponicIOT.Options.MqttSettingsOptions.EnableZigbee2MqttBridge
member.summary: Enable the Zigbee2MQTT bridge integration. When true the broker subscribes to / topics and translates ZCL payloads into sensor readings.

member.name: P:AeroponicIOT.Options.MqttSettingsOptions.Zigbee2MqttTopicPrefix
member.summary: Root topic prefix that Zigbee2MQTT publishes to (default: "zigbee2mqtt").

member.name: P:AeroponicIOT.Options.MqttSettingsOptions.EnforceZigbeeTopicAcl
member.summary: Whether to enforce ACL checks on Zigbee2MQTT topics.

member.name: P:AeroponicIOT.Options.MqttSettingsOptions.ZigbeeBridgeUsername
member.summary: Optional bridge MQTT username allowed to publish to Zigbee topics.

member.name: P:AeroponicIOT.Options.MqttSettingsOptions.ZigbeeBridgeClientId
member.summary: Optional bridge MQTT client id allowed to publish to Zigbee topics.

member.name: T:AeroponicIOT.Services.AI.AIAnalysisBackgroundService
member.summary: Background service that periodically analyzes recent sensor data across all devices and generates AI-powered suggestions. This catches insights that might be missed during real-time ingestion (e.g., gradual trends, cross-device patterns).

member.name: T:AeroponicIOT.Services.AI.AIOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for the AI suggestion service.

member.name: P:AeroponicIOT.Services.AI.AIOptions.Enabled
member.summary: Whether the AI suggestion feature is enabled.

member.name: P:AeroponicIOT.Services.AI.AIOptions.Endpoint
member.summary: The AI provider endpoint URL. Supports any OpenAI-compatible API (e.g., OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, local LLM).

member.name: P:AeroponicIOT.Services.AI.AIOptions.ApiKey
member.summary: API key for the AI provider.

member.name: P:AeroponicIOT.Services.AI.AIOptions.Model
member.summary: The model to use (e.g., gpt-4o-mini, gpt-4o, claude-sonnet-4-20250514).

member.name: P:AeroponicIOT.Services.AI.AIOptions.MaxTokens
member.summary: Maximum tokens for the AI response.

member.name: P:AeroponicIOT.Services.AI.AIOptions.Temperature
member.summary: Temperature for response creativity (0.0 = deterministic, 1.0 = creative).

member.name: P:AeroponicIOT.Services.AI.AIOptions.CooldownMinutes
member.summary: Only generate suggestions if no suggestion was made in the last N minutes for the same device. Default: 60 minutes.

member.name: P:AeroponicIOT.Services.AI.AIOptions.SystemPromptOverride
member.summary: Optional system prompt override. If empty, a default aeroponic expert prompt is used.

member.name: P:AeroponicIOT.Services.AI.AIOptions.ProxyUrl
member.summary: Optional proxy URL for the AI API calls.

member.name: T:AeroponicIOT.Services.AI.AiSuggestionResult
member.summary: Represents a suggestion generated by the AI analysis of sensor data.

member.name: P:AeroponicIOT.Services.AI.AiSuggestionResult.Title
member.summary: A short, actionable title for the suggestion.

member.name: P:AeroponicIOT.Services.AI.AiSuggestionResult.Message
member.summary: Detailed suggestion message with reasoning and actionable advice.

member.name: P:AeroponicIOT.Services.AI.AiSuggestionResult.Type
member.summary: The notification severity level.

member.name: P:AeroponicIOT.Services.AI.AiSuggestionResult.SuggestedAction
member.summary: Optional suggested actuator action (e.g., "pump:ON", "light:OFF"). Can be parsed by the automation layer.

member.name: P:AeroponicIOT.Services.AI.AiSuggestionResult.Confidence
member.summary: Confidence score 0-100.

member.name: T:AeroponicIOT.Services.AI.AiSuggestionCacheEntry
member.summary: Lightweight record stored to track the last AI suggestion per device (cooldown).

member.name: T:AeroponicIOT.Services.AI.AISuggestionService
member.summary: Analyzes sensor data using an OpenAI-compatible AI API and returns actionable aeroponic farming suggestions. Integrates with the notification system so that suggestions are delivered to the device owner.

member.name: M:AeroponicIOT.Services.AI.AISuggestionService.BuildPrompt(AeroponicIOT.Models.Device,AeroponicIOT.Models.SensorLog,System.Collections.Generic.List{AeroponicIOT.Models.SensorLog},System.String)
member.summary: Build the prompt sent to the AI model with context about the device and readings.

member.name: M:AeroponicIOT.Services.AI.AISuggestionService.CallAiApiAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Call the OpenAI-compatible API and parse the structured response.

member.name: M:AeroponicIOT.Services.AI.AISuggestionService.GetCurrentCropStage(AeroponicIOT.Models.Device)
member.summary: Determine the current crop stage for the device.

member.name: M:AeroponicIOT.Services.AI.AISuggestionService.BuildOptimalRangesDescription(AeroponicIOT.Models.CropStage)
member.summary: Build a human-readable description of optimal ranges for the current stage.

member.name: M:AeroponicIOT.Services.AI.AISuggestionService.GetCropAgeDays(AeroponicIOT.Models.Device)
member.summary: Calculate days since crop was assigned to the device.

member.name: T:AeroponicIOT.Services.AI.IAISuggestionService
member.summary: Service that analyzes sensor data using an AI model and returns actionable aeroponic farming suggestions that can be delivered as notifications.

member.name: M:AeroponicIOT.Services.AI.IAISuggestionService.AnalyzeSensorDataAsync(System.Int32,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Analyze the latest sensor reading for a device and return an AI-generated suggestion. Returns null if no actionable suggestion is needed or if AI is not configured.

member.name: T:AeroponicIOT.Services.Automation.AutomationBackgroundService
member.summary: Background service that executes automation rules (schedule- and threshold-based) and sends actuator commands via MQTT.

member.name: M:AeroponicIOT.Services.Automation.AutomationBackgroundService.ShouldExecuteTimerRule(AeroponicIOT.Models.AutomationRule,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Timer (fixed-duration / pulse-style) rules. These are treated as "fire every DurationMinutes" with a minimum 1-minute spacing, regardless of sensor values.

member.name: T:AeroponicIOT.Services.Maintenance.LogRetentionBackgroundService
member.summary: Periodically cleans up old sensor and actuator logs based on configured retention.

member.summary: Interface for MQTT broker functionality

member.summary: Start the MQTT broker

member.name: M:AeroponicIOT.Services.Mqtt.IMqttService.StopAsync
member.summary: Stop the MQTT broker

member.summary: Publish a message to a topic

member.name: P:AeroponicIOT.Services.Mqtt.IMqttService.IsRunning
member.summary: Check if the broker is running

member.name: P:AeroponicIOT.Services.Mqtt.IMqttService.IsZigbeeBridgeReady
member.summary: Indicates whether Zigbee bridge readiness requirements are satisfied. Returns true when Zigbee bridging is disabled, ACL is disabled, or the configured bridge identity has authenticated at least once since startup.

member.name: P:AeroponicIOT.Services.Mqtt.IMqttService.ZigbeeBridgeReadinessMessage
member.summary: Provides a human-readable readiness status for Zigbee bridge integration.

member.name: T:AeroponicIOT.Services.Mqtt.MqttService
member.summary: MQTT broker service for device communication Handles device connections, subscriptions, and message publishing

member.name: M:AeroponicIOT.Services.Mqtt.MqttService.StartAsync
member.summary: Start the MQTT broker on the configured port

member.name: M:AeroponicIOT.Services.Mqtt.MqttService.StopAsync
member.summary: Stop the MQTT broker

member.name: M:AeroponicIOT.Services.Mqtt.MqttService.PublishAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Publish a message to a specific topic

member.name: M:AeroponicIOT.Services.Mqtt.MqttService.HandleZigbee2MqttMessageAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Full Zigbee2MQTT message handler that receives the decoded JSON string. Called from once bytes are read.

member.name: M:AeroponicIOT.Services.Mqtt.MqttService.HandleZigbeeBridgeEventAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Auto-provisions a new Zigbee device as a record with ProtocolType = "zigbee" and Status = Pending when it joins the coordinator for the first time. A user can then claim it from the dashboard using the standard claim flow.

member.name: T:AeroponicIOT.Services.Mqtt.ZigbeePayloadMapper
member.summary:
Translates Zigbee2MQTT ZCL-derived JSON payloads into the internal format used by the sensor ingestion pipeline.
Zigbee2MQTT uses standard ZCL cluster attribute names (e.g. "temperature", "humidity", "illuminance_lux") which differ from the ESP32 firmware JSON keys ("waterTemperature", "airHumidity", "lightIntensity"). This mapper normalises both naming conventions to a single DTO.
When Zigbee2MQTT is configured with advanced.include_device_information: true every telemetry message contains an ieee_address field (e.g. "0x00124b0014d9b021") which is the stable hardware EUI-64 identifier. The mapper uses it as the canonical value (uppercased) so lookups against Device.MacAddress stored during auto-provisioning succeed. When the field is absent the Zigbee2MQTT friendly name is used as a fallback.
Non-standard ZCL fields (ph, tds) are also accepted for custom Zigbee water-quality probes that expose them via manufacturer-specific clusters.

member.name: M:AeroponicIOT.Services.Mqtt.ZigbeePayloadMapper.TryMap(System.String,System.String,System.String[]@)
member.summary: Attempts to map a Zigbee2MQTT device payload to a .
member.param: The Zigbee2MQTT friendly name extracted from the MQTT topic. Used as the device identifier only when the payload contains no ieee_address (i.e. include_device_information is off).
Raw JSON payload published by Zigbee2MQTT.
member.returns: A populated when at least one known sensor field was present; null otherwise (e.g. link-quality-only frames).

member.name: T:AeroponicIOT.Services.Notifications.EmailService
member.summary: Email service implementation using MailKit/SMTP

member.summary: Interface for email sending functionality

member.summary: Send an email

member.summary: Send an email to multiple recipients

member.summary: Check SMTP configuration and optionally test connectivity/authentication.

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a type. Example: T:Namespace.Outer+Inner`1 becomes T:Namespace.Outer.Inner`1

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.PropertyInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName or for an indexer P:Namespace.ContainingType.Item(System.Int32)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property given its container type and property name. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.MethodInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a method (or constructor). For example: M:Namespace.ContainingType.MethodName(ParamType1,ParamType2)~ReturnType M:Namespace.ContainingType.#ctor(ParamType)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.GetTypeDocId(System.Type,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generates a documentation ID string for a type. This method handles nested types (replacing '+' with '.'), generic types, arrays, pointers, by-ref types, and generic parameters. The flag controls whether constructed generic type arguments are emitted, while controls whether the generic arity marker (e.g. "`1") is appended.

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.NormalizeDocId(System.String)
member.summary: Normalizes a documentation comment ID to match the compiler-style format. Strips the return type suffix for ordinary methods but retains it for conversion operators.
member.param: The documentation comment ID to normalize.
